# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kafka topic authorization.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Configuration - Production Deployment
# server.properties

############################# Server Basics #############################

# Unique broker ID for this node in the cluster
broker.id=1

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# Listeners with SSL/SASL for secure communication
# PLAINTEXT should NEVER be used in production
listeners=SASL_SSL://0.0.0.0:9093
advertised.listeners=SASL_SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093

# Listener security protocol mapping
listener.security.protocol.map=SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL

# Inter-broker communication must also be secured
inter.broker.listener.name=SASL_SSL
security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL

# Number of threads for network and I/O operations
num.network.threads=8
num.io.threads=16

# Socket server buffer sizes
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

############################# SASL Configuration #############################

# SASL mechanism for authentication
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512

# JAAS configuration for inter-broker authentication
# Credentials should be managed via secrets management (e.g., Vault, K8s secrets)
# Reference external JAAS config file instead of inline passwords
# Set via KAFKA_OPTS="-Djava.security.auth.login.config=/etc/kafka/kafka_server_jaas.conf"

############################# SSL Configuration #############################

# SSL keystore and truststore paths
# Passwords should be provided via environment variables or secrets manager
# Use ssl.keystore.password, ssl.key.password, ssl.truststore.password
# configured via external password file or environment variable injection
ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker-1.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.type=JKS
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.type=JKS

# Strong TLS protocol and cipher suites only
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3

# Restrict to strong cipher suites
ssl.cipher.suites=TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256

# Require client authentication (mutual TLS)
ssl.client.auth=required

# SSL endpoint identification for hostname verification
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https

############################# Authorization (ACL) Configuration #############################

# Enable ACL-based authorization - CRITICAL for topic authorization security
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer

# Super users - strictly limited to essential service accounts only
super.users=User:kafka-admin

# Deny access by default - explicit allowlist approach (least privilege)
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false

# ACL provider uses Zookeeper for storage
# ACLs must be explicitly configured per topic, consumer group, and cluster operations

############################# Log Basics #############################

# Comma-separated list of log directories on separate disks for performance and redundancy
log.dirs=/data/kafka-logs-1,/data/kafka-logs-2,/data/kafka-logs-3

# Default number of partitions per topic
num.partitions=6

# Number of threads per data directory for log recovery at startup and flushing
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum in-sync replicas required for a write to be considered successful
min.insync.replicas=2

# Only allow in-sync replicas to be elected as leader
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Replication fetch settings
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

# Number of fetcher threads for replication
num.replica.fetchers=4

############################# Topic Settings #############################

# Disable auto-creation of topics to enforce explicit topic management and ACLs
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Disable topic deletion via admin client in production (use controlled processes)
delete.topic.enable=false

# Message size limits
message.max.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# Retain logs for 7 days
log.retention.hours=168

# Maximum size of a log segment file
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# Interval for checking log retention
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Log cleanup policy
log.cleanup.policy=delete

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Flush settings - let OS handle flushing for best performance
# but set upper bounds for durability
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000

############################# Zookeeper Configuration #############################

# Zookeeper connection with chroot for namespace isolation
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.example.com:2181,zk-2.example.com:2181,zk-3.example.com:2181/kafka-production

# Zookeeper connection and session timeouts
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Enable Zookeeper SSL/TLS
zookeeper.ssl.client.enable=true
zookeeper.clientCnxnSocket=org.apache.zookeeper.ClientCnxnSocketNetty
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker-1.keystore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
# Zookeeper SSL passwords managed via external secrets
zookeeper.ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3

# Set ACLs on Zookeeper znodes for security
zookeeper.set.acl=true

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# Delay for initial consumer rebalance (allows more consumers to join before rebalancing)
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

# Offsets topic replication and partitions
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
offsets.topic.num.partitions=50

# Transaction state log settings
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Controlled Shutdown #############################

controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Metrics and Monitoring #############################

# Enable JMX for monitoring (bind to localhost only, use SSH tunnel for remote access)
# Set via KAFKA_JMX_OPTS environment variable with authentication enabled

# Metric reporters
metric.reporters=

# Metrics sampling window
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000
metrics.num.samples=2

############################# Request Processing #############################

# Maximum time for a request to be processed
request.timeout.ms=30000

# Queued request limits
queued.max.requests=500

# Connection limits per IP to prevent abuse
max.connections.per.ip=100

############################# Background Threads #############################

background.threads=10
